name: Ping An Fund Management Co Ltd - Ping An CSI Guangdong -HK- Macao Greater Bay Area Dev Thematic Fund
summary: Ping An Fund Management Co Ltd - Ping An CSI Guangdong -HK- Macao Greater Bay Area Dev Thematic Fund is a thematic fund focused on the Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macao Greater Bay Area development. It is managed by Ping An Fund Management Co Ltd. The fund is based in China.
